title: Angle Entry Flow
description: A beginner-friendly Thai boxing session focused on clean entries, balance, and simple counters.

exercises.title: Jumping Jacks
exercises.description: Raise your heart rate and wake up the whole body.
exercises.help: Start light and stay relaxed through the shoulders.

exercises.title: Shadow Boxing
exercises.description: Move lightly in stance and rehearse basic punches and kicks.
exercises.help: Stay loose and let your feet guide the rhythm.

exercises.title: Jab Cross Return
exercises.description: Throw a jab-cross and recover quickly back to guard.
exercises.help: Snap the punches and bring both hands home fast.

exercises.title: Push-Up
exercises.description: Build upper-body strength and shoulder stability.
exercises.help: Keep your body straight and control the full range.

exercises.title: Parry to Cross
exercises.description: Parry the incoming jab and answer immediately with a rear cross.
exercises.help: Keep the parry small so the counter fires fast.

exercises.title: Teep to Middle Kick
exercises.description: Use a teep to create space, then step back in with a middle kick.
exercises.help: Regain balance after the teep before you swing the kick.

exercises.title: Squat
exercises.description: Develop leg strength and base control for strikes.
exercises.help: Sit into the hips and keep your chest tall.

exercises.title: Slip Hook Cross
exercises.description: Slip off the center line, return with a lead hook, then finish with a cross.
exercises.help: Make the slip tight and punch as soon as your feet are set.

exercises.title: Catch to Rear Teep
exercises.description: Catch the kick, reset your stance, and push back with a rear teep.
exercises.help: Stay balanced on the catch before sending the teep straight through.

exercises.title: Standing Hamstring Stretch
exercises.description: Stretch the back of the legs after the striking work.
exercises.help: Hinge gently and keep the knees soft.

exercises.title: Butterfly Stretch
exercises.description: Open the groin and inner thighs with controlled breathing.
exercises.help: Sit tall and let the knees drop without forcing them.

exercises.title: Pigeon Stretch
exercises.description: Release the hips and improve external rotation.
exercises.help: Square the hips and breathe into the stretch.

exercises.title: Deep Squat Hold
exercises.description: Finish with a mobility hold for the hips, groin, and ankles.
exercises.help: Keep the heels grounded and the spine long.
